title: Study On Outpost-21 Macro Climate. Dated: March 4, 2570
body:
Over the past few months, scientists on A-Shift, with minor assistance from C-Shift employees, have been trying to answer a pressing question on Muriki. With clear presence of large fauna, such as Teppis and Gartantuan Spiders, abundance of Jils, and our resident dragon Zircon. A question was rising: Without large amounts of plantlife and small insects, what is feeding the macrofauna? They should have starved to death years ago, and yet, their life is flourishing, even with only primitive and sparce plantlife just now being documented.


With new footage and readings from the 'Experiment' Penetration Program, assistance from notable field researchers such as Tallies-The-Stars on C-Shift, and most of the A-Shift science team, we believe to have come to a conclusion.


The anomalous 'circumorphs', or 'clowns' are likely to blame. As these clowns have been known to gestate from nothing, and self-revive with even the most obscene injuries. Several teppi were seen gnawing on the regenerating clowns, and a few expies have learned how to continually spitroast the clowns for reliable meat sources. This has likely been the source of major nutrition for the new plantgrowth, as well as the source of nutrition for most of the macrofauna on station. More in-depth dietary tests and examinations will be performed, with a recommendation of C-shift taking lead.


A long-form paper going over the findings in detail can be found in the station's Bingle network, along with other notable discoveries.
author: Research Director Mendez

title: Spring Arrives at Outpost-21. Dated: February 25, 2570
body:
Another winter is passing Local Outpost-21, and with every year, snowmelt off the local facility and northwen mountain side has causes an increase in water levels, causing flooding in the lower levels of the facility, and an increase in ponds around the station.


Crew are reminded to excersie extreme caution, as some station terrain may be unstable from illegal surface mining, along with the floodwater erosion.


Already, many in A and B shifts have reported damage to lower station tunnels, as floodwaters have damaged certain bridges crossing the rivers, especially along the northern river, most effected by the surge in water levels.


Crew are reminded not to play, swim, or otherwise recreate in the river, especially due to aggressive currents, and wildlife noted in the river.


In addition, due to the warmer weather, many local fauna are likely to be re-emerging from caves and dens where they had lasted out the winter. Crew are advised to remain on alert for the increase in wildlife.
author: Karawkkiki

title: Outpost-21 To Begin Penetration Testing. Dated: February 22, 2570
body:
(Outpost-21 Exclusive)


After significant legal research and ethics deliberation, a green-light has been given to begin performing 'penetrating testing' on Outpost-21 grounds.


To accomplish this, OP-21 has received the rights to a species of 'Experimentals' or 'Expies.' They have been survivably modified and epigenetically pre-wired by Sleeve Geneticist Vel Kliss. These 'Expies' will be released on station grounds as 'stowaway' actors with the coming spring weather to best assess how unauthorized stowaways can survive and adapt in the hostile Muriki environment, in order for crew to enhance station defense.


These 'Expies' will be equipped with sensors, cameras, and other monitoring devices to analyze their survival capability. While they will be sanctioned and approved under Outpost-21 Central Command, crew are encouraged to treat these individuals the same as they would with any other stowaway.


Security is not to arrest or process the Expies due to their pre-identified nature, and is only required to shoo them off station if caught. Security is authorized immediate lethal force in any event where they act hostile to station or crew. They have been epigenetically modified to simply seek survival, and protect their home (engrained as the terraformer and tunnels, but not explicitly the station)


Crew are encouraged not to provide medical or emotional support, as while they are often timid and cautious; like most creatures, they will adapt to their environment, and may act hostile to station crew, especially if they perceive crew in the maintenance tunnels as an threat to 'their home.'


They are typically between 4-5 feet in height, with dark gray or black fur. They have a fanned tailtip that shares a faint orange glow along with their eyes and blood, and often seem somewhat gaunt.
author: Karawkkiki

title: Exosuits - PSA. Dated: Feb 2, 2570
body:
Affected Departments:


Engineering


Security


Medical


Cargo


Due to a recent event where multiple Armed Gygax's were hijacked and utilized against acting command and security forces, fortunately without any lasting damage or injuries, I have formed this guideline to assist Robotics and any department receiving mechs and exosuits from robotics.



Exosuits do not inherently have access restrictions in place, but it is highly recommended that appropriate restrictions are put in place.


Unless the ID Upload Panel has been locked, a mech should start with it unlocked. From outside the exosuit, one may press their ID to the exosuit to access panel, they can select 'Edit Operation Keycodes' to whitelist access. The permission will lock on it's own after finalizing the selection and can be unlocked from the Data panel within the exosuit, if one has access to it.


Note: Access options are directly related to the access available to the ID provided, thus a roboticist will not be able to set the access for other departments, they will only be able to provide robotics or engineering access, among a few other options tied to their department.


Considering this, it is HIGHLY recommended that exosuits are directly transferred from Roboticist to a staff member of the department receiving the exosuit, and the permissions applied immediately.


It is also HIGHLY recommended that tools/weapons are transferred separately, detached from the exosuit and only attached following the permissions being set in place. This includes Drills, Syringe Guns, and any firearm or laser.


NOTICE: A staff member must possess ALL access that is whitelisted on the mech. For example, if a mech has security access, as well as robotics access, neither an officer nor a roboticist will have access to the mech, only a head of staff or command officer with access to both security and robotics will be able to enter the mech and unlock the panel to reapply access.


Thank you for your attention to this matter. Lessons are often learned in blood, but let's work as a well oiled machine to make sure this one doesn't need more.
author: Captain Trashfire

title: Outpost-21 Security in Crossfire. Dated: Jan 31, 2570
body:
(This Article Not Marked for Out of System Postage. Local Distribution Only.)


Following a currently restricted incident resulting in three crewmembers being shot at the bunker check-in, an investigation has been opened into security forces on C-Shift, and B-Shift failing to enforce station contraband laws. Planet Muriki is currently under Blackout orders until further notice.


As of current, all security forces on A, B, and C shift on both surface and subterrain facilities are due for retraining, and will have all paychecks revoked for two months. Further, Captains Khrutch of C-Shift and Heind of B-Shift will also suffer pay reductions, forced retraining, and temporary removal from authority following the results of the investigation.


Central Command Sapient Resources Head (CCSRH) Winchester was reported saying 'While the crewmember initially responsible for the incident was charged, this is a failing of security above all else. Their lack of knowledge and lack of willingness to enforce the standards we uphold for the safety of all our crewmembers directly resulted in this.'


When asked about the recent sentience granted to a chicken by B-Shift, he said that 'actions are still pending' and he has 'no further comments' at this time.


He also confirmed that the stowaway incident earlier this month was a significant factor to the mass punishment, after investigation found at least two of the stowaways involved in the 'rebellion' had been seen joining in multiple B-Shift parties, including the leader who had been given a paper crown and declared 'queen of the station.'


B-Shift security is also under additional fire for failure to contain the wild parties that often lead to departments being turned into gunfights, bombarded, or otherwise trashed for following C-Shifts, with threats of permanent dismissal of HoS Dirge Dallund of B-Shift if the situation cannot be wrangled under control.
author: Karawkkiki

title: Oupost-21 Beset by Stowaway Rebellion! Dated: Jan 20, 2570
body:
Recently, Outpost-21 suffered a near nightmare scenario: A group of approximately 7 stowaways; Individuals living on outpost grounds without approval, often in substandard conditions; had been stealing countless amounts of weapons, ammunition, and armor from the station. To include hijacking at least two station synthetics, repurposing an old Heavy Autonomous Security Defender (HASD) Drone, and hijacking most of the armored vehicles on station and the station's cargo trawler.


They had utilized these resources to build a shelter for themselves up at the outpost's listening outpost where they attempted to seize control of the station, utilizing the communication systems against the station to rather alarming effect.


Security officers reported having grenades dropped from above by three flying individuals. Air and power systems throughout the station were sabotaged due to one crewmember that had been loyalty implanted, and the rogue 'borg' unit going unnoticed, prompting a call for a change to synthetic laws and chassis enforcements.


The engagement lasted on station for several hours, with ERT needing to be called during a station-shelling when the last security forces and few deputized crew had failed in their engagements. Resulting in 11 crew casualties, and all 7 stowaways being killed in combat. One of the rogue synthetics was captured and had its laws forcibly reset. It and the unit destroyed in combat had their footage pulled, which is now undergoing review by Central Command Security for a comprehensive report for C-Shift employees. However, one hijacked borg was not seen in the wreckage or recovered bodies, and is suspected to still be at large.


Surviving crew could not be reached for comment at this time.
author: Karawkkiki

title: Outpost Struck by Mercenaries, AI Core Destroyed! Dated: Jan 11, 2570
body:
Recently, Local Outpost-21 was struck by an incredibly lethal strike by unknown mercenary forces, a missile barrage was sent to overwhelm station defences, allowing two drop pods to slip in: one impacting near the southern lake, the other impacting in the bar's Drunk Tank, both containing a small team. The first gaining a surprise attack against station engineers, causing severe damage. While the other waited and struck later, the leader reported to be utilizing a variety of weapons and a localized shield, allowing their team to work to strong effect, inflicting three casualties.


However, the rogue intruder was brought down by security forces, though strapping explosive charges to their chest prior to death, presumably to prevent capture of themselves or their equipment.


Crew accounts state that a shadekin EMT was largely responsible for minimizing the damage the lead sniper could do, by warning crew away from windows and walls too close to where the individual was, and allowing security to properly engage and neutralize the target.


The following day, the AI core was overrun by an erronious lawset, resulting in two borgs self destructing to kill or maim crew, and the eventual self-destruct of the AI core when the crew tried to reclaim it and reset their laws... while the source of the hack is largely unknown, it is suspected it may be linked to the mercenary team from the day prior, likely using a sophisticated AI of their own to continually reset the station AI's laws.
author: Karawkkiki

title: A new year and new decade! Dated: Jan 5, 2570
body:
Outpost 21 has seen a very productive and interesting year, and with the turn of the decade, E-Shui would like to wish all staff a happy new year, and the best of success to each employee over the next decade, and wish to provide a quick summary to catch up new employees in such a time of growth.


The Skrell and Unathi war continues, with open conflict in space of both nations and multiple stations being traded in ownership. While Solgov has remained out of the war, E-Shui has seen conflict from Skrell forces attempting to probe station defenses, and confirmed Syndicate forces hoping to seize the chaos.


Redspace research has been given a green-light from SolGov on local Outpost-21, due to the station's unique location. However, E-Shui would like to remind crew to be cautious, as multiple companies have been producing and selling fake, unreliable, and unsafe devices mislabeled as 'redspace' attempting to capitalize on the new discovery. Crewmembers are strongly encouraged to use caution when utilizing any unconfirmed devices, and provide no information to off-station individuals claiming to have knowledge of redspace, as they are likely scams.


Local Outpost-22's construction is underway, with the goal to provide enhanced fire support for Muriki, monitor long-term terraforming progress, and provide a more secure location for more risky research.


Outpost 18's renovations of the Xenochimera wing, and psych wings have been completed.


Muriki has won the award for 'Most Haunted Planet In the Sector' for the 12th year in a row, and has risen from 'Most Haunted Planet In Known Space' from 7th place, to 5th place.


The Wizard federation continues to impose sanctions on all cultures claiming to have 'magic' at their disposal, and ES would like to remind that 'spellbooks', 'wands', 'scrolls', and other 'magic' items should be turned in immediately.
author: Karawkkiki

title: Automated Archival Notice
body: Scheduled network sync complete. Records have been archived. Proceeding with regular operations. Happy Earth new years from E-SHUI.
author: ES-Net-Test
